name: Diabetic Carrot-Raisin Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the grated carrots, crushed pineapple, and raisins in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Chill for 2-3 hours to allow flavors to meld.
4. Stir in the plain, low-fat yogurt.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves, if desired.
This recipe yields 7 servings, with each serving containing half a cup of salad. Each serving can be substituted with one fruit and one vegetable from the Diabetic Kitchen of Joni in S.Jersey. Enjoy!
